chief_complaint: A 3-year-old male child presented with clinical symptoms of respiratory disease.
history: The child was admitted to the Infectious Disease Centre of the Regional Clinical Hospital of Karaganda city. During most of the COVID-19 pandemic (2020-2022), influenza circulation in Kazakhstan and neighbouring Russia declined, but then returned with higher transmission rates in autumn 2022. The patient had a nasopharyngeal swab that detected the strain /Karaganda/ 06/2022 (H1N1) pdm09.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Nasopharyngeal swab detected the strain /Karaganda/ 06/2022 (H1N1) pdm09.
